initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_brand_id,
    i_brand,
    i_manufact_id,
    i_manufact,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS ext_price
FROM 
    store_sales
JOIN 
    date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN 
    item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN 
    customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_moy = 11
    AND date_dim.d_year = 1998
    AND item.i_manager_id = 8
    AND SUBSTRING(customer_address.ca_zip, 1, 5) <> SUBSTRING(store.s_zip, 1, 5)
GROUP BY 
    i_brand_id,
    i_brand,
    i_manufact_id,
    i_manufact
ORDER BY 
    ext_price DESC,
    i_brand ASC,
    i_brand_id ASC,
    i_manufact ASC
LIMIT 100
